description: Beyond the Veil Patch 3 (9 January 2023) — Roads of Avalon overhaul, Streamer Mode, Other Changes, Combat Balance Changes (Axes, Daggers, Hammers, Nature Staffs, Quarterstaffs, Spears, Swords, Shoes, Mists), Fixes.

sections.heading: Roads of Avalon Changes
sections.description: Significant overhaul and re-balance of the Roads of Avalon, opening them to a wider audience without taking content away from existing audiences.
items: Roaming Avalonian Mobs and weaker Avalonian Camps adjusted for 1-3 players; marked with green chest icon
Medium Avalonian Camps largely unchanged, better protected from small groups; marked with blue chest icon; exclusive to groups of 4-6+
Strong Avalonian Camps have buffed rewards; marked with orange icon; for groups of 7+ players
Camps and chests now respawn significantly faster
Mobs protecting chests now upgrade as the chest upgrades; when a chest upgrades it respawns all mobs
Roads of Avalon now feature revamped environmental visuals
Knockback of Cartwheel and Sweep from Raid Camp Monk reduced to match roaming version
Roaming Avalonian Warrior no longer hits with a second auto-attack
Roaming Avalonian Warrior and Avalonian Knight have substantially reduced Damage, Health, and rewards
sections.searchable_text: Roads of Avalon overhaul re-balance camps green blue orange chest icons respawn mobs upgrade environment visuals Monk Cartwheel Sweep Warrior Knight auto-attack

sections.heading: Streamer Mode Introduced
sections.description: An optional Safe Streamer Mode can be turned on/off in Settings. Hides UI components that could reveal character position during live-streaming, hides login email on disconnect. Note: when streaming via Steam, login email is still visible on character selection screen.
sections.searchable_text: Streamer Mode Settings UI components position live-streaming login email disconnect Steam character selection

sections.heading: Other Changes
items: The Home-binding removal debuff from fast traveling from a Rest or Outlands Hideout is now more lenient: only removes Home binding when walking from a Portal City to the Outlands. Traveling to the Outlands via Roads or Mists will not remove Home binding.
The map for Crystal League and Crystal Arena has been changed for the rest of Season 18 from "Spade" to "Cross"
sections.searchable_text: Other Changes Home binding debuff fast travel Rest Outlands Hideout Portal City Roads Mists Crystal League Crystal Arena Season 18 Spade Cross map

subsections.heading: Axes
subsections.searchable_text: Axes Raging Blades Hit Detection additional hit Inner Ring Radius 2.5m 2m

changes.raw_text: Raging Blades: Vastly improved Hit Detection; Added an additional hit directly on activation; Inner Ring Radius: 2.5m → 2m
notes: Vastly improved Hit Detection to be more reliable
Added an additional hit directly on activation

subsections.heading: Daggers
subsections.searchable_text: Daggers Shadow Edge Hit Detection Slit Throat Dagger Pair uninterruptible Cast Range 2m 3m Tolerance 5m 7m

changes.raw_text: Shadow Edge: Improved Hit Detection at max range
notes: Improved Hit Detection at max range

changes.raw_text: Slit Throat (Dagger Pair): The cast is now uninterruptible. Cast Range: 2m → 3m; Cast Range Tolerance: 5m → 7m

subsections.heading: Hammers
subsections.searchable_text: Hammers Iron Breaker removes enemy shields

changes.raw_text: Iron Breaker (all Hammers): Now also removes enemy shields

subsections.heading: Nature Staffs
subsections.searchable_text: Nature Staffs Rejuvenating Flower ally stepping Flower Area Radius 3m 5m Max Targets 5 10 Standtime 0.4s 0s Spiritual Seed Druid Staff Cooldown after Recast 20s 30s Spirit Animal Rampant Staff Max Targets 15 20 Healing Increased per Ally 30% 20% Maximum Targets for Heal 10 20

changes.raw_text: Rejuvenating Flower: The Flower on the ground is now activated by any ally stepping on it. Flower Area Radius: 3m → 5m; Max Targets: 5 → 10; Standtime: 0.4s → 0s
notes: The Flower on the ground is now activated by any ally stepping on it

changes.raw_text: Spiritual Seed (Druid Staff): Cooldown after Recast: 20s → 30s (Casting once still has 20s cooldown)
Spirit Animal (Rampant Staff): Max Targets: 15 → 20; Healing Increased per Ally: 30% → 20%; Maximum Targets for Heal Increase: 10 → 20

subsections.heading: Swords
subsections.searchable_text: Swords Spinning Blades Dual Swords CC immune jump Heroic Charges knockborne 0.6s Auto Attack Buff Duration 5s 3s Damage Increase 50% 100%

changes.raw_text: Spinning Blades (Dual Swords): The Caster is now immune to all CC Effects during the Jump; Damage is now independent of Heroic Charges (always does 2 Heroic Charges damage); Enemies are knocked airborne for 0.6s on impact; Auto Attack Buff Duration: 5s → 3s; Auto Attack Buff Damage Increase: 50% → 100%
notes: The Caster is now immune to all CC Effects during the Jump
Damage is now independent of Heroic Charges (always does 2 Heroic Charges damage)
Enemies are knocked airborne for 0.6s on impact

notes: Caster is now also immune to purges for 0.2s

notes: Caster is now also immune to purges for 0.2s

subsections.heading: Mists
subsections.searchable_text: Mists Long Hostile Dismount Ability Cooldown 12s 15s

sections.heading: Fixes
items: Fixed issue where Storm Shield (Wild Magic / Feyscale Robe) was incorrectly triggered by each tick of Damage over Time spells
Mist Cloud (Mistwalker Jacket) now only applies invisibility to party members
Fixed visual effects and Fame rewards for certain Avalonian mobs
Elite mobs in the Roads of Avalon now have the same values as those in Avalonian Dungeons
Fixed issue where City Portal binding could sometimes transport player back to the 'old' Portal City after removing binding in a different city
Fixed issue where auto-denying custom matches was not possible
Fixed issue where client crashed after disconnecting while fishing
Removed 'Eggsecutioner' Weapon Skin from Twitch Drops and Vanity Merchant 'Community' Section
Fixed issue where Snow Husky audio would play with each mount cast
Additional graphical, animation, audio, UI, terrain, and localization fixes
